case_title: ISRAEL THEADO TASWELL VS. MATTRESS FIRM, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TASWELL, ISRAEL THEADO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JULIO GARCIA, STORE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-17-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ISRAEL THEADO TASWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM, IN. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED JULIO GARCIA, STORE MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA COLLEGE LAW MEDIATORS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, AND THE VOLUNTARY MEDIATION AGREEMENT WILL BE DISCLOSED TO THE HEARING OFFICER OF THE DAY. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDGE PURSUANT SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES ARE JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506
